title: ammophila arundinacea
intro: Ammophila arundinacea, commonly known as Marram grass, is a type of coastal grass that is native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Marram grass include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, Marram grass is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
